# Example JSON Schema catalog (`tests/fixtures/catalog`)

Test fixtures for `switchback-jsonschema` catalog-mode loader and pass-through
tests. Schemas under `schemas/` exercise external file `$ref`, internal
`$defs`/`definitions` pointers, and cyclic references.

See
[`switchback-protobuf/tests/fixtures/proto/`](../../../../switchback-protobuf/tests/fixtures/proto/)
for the parallel protobuf fixture layout.
